content: vortice lore is terrible please don't make bottom tier filler like her again 💔

I appreciate this response though it might get lost in this thread. It's nice to see that at least you've addressed this point.

I do hope that when breaking promises in the future, there's at least an explanation on why it was done. I understand that sometimes promises made were genuine at time of writing, but circumstances change.

At least this way we know that it's not swept under the rug

i'm newbie on this game, and saw some arguements about updates and AA contents for few days, i feel both user and Dev side. i believe that it was based on love about the game. hope Morimens keep going well and longer expands, i appreciate thanks to everyone. users who love and worrying for a game, and also for Devs working hard for a good game :3 

i really like this game! good story, sounds and game concepts~
